Provider failover (routeModelWithFallback exists, no live kill-test)
lessons: Class 7 regression: said 'зашит' for swarm without starting bot
CWD-dependence was THE stitch-breaker — validator-shadow found it by running from wrong dir
app.routes internal structure differs between FastAPI versions — use app.openapi() for stability
SIGTERM write-back doesn't fire under Telegraf — use periodic write-back instead
